inputs.label: Capillary Rise Height
inputs.businessContext: Measured height difference between liquid in capillary and free surface

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured height difference between liquid in capillary and free surface
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kılcal borudaki sıvı ile serbest yüzey arasındaki ölçülen yükseklik farkı

businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence de hauteur mesurée entre le liquide dans le capillaire et la surface libre

inputs.label: Capillary Radius
inputs.businessContext: Inner radius of the capillary tube

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner radius of the capillary tube

inputs.label: Contact Angle
inputs.businessContext: Contact angle between liquid and capillary wall, 0° for completely wetting liquids

businessContext_i18n.en: Contact angle between liquid and capillary wall, 0° for completely wetting liquids
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı ile kılcal duvar arasındaki temas açısı, tamamen ıslatan sıvılar için 0°
businessContext_i18n.de: Kontaktwinkel zwischen Flüssigkeit und Kapillarwand, 0° für vollständig benetzende Flüssigkeiten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de contact entre le liquide et la paroi du capillaire, 0° pour les liquides parfaitement mouillants
